title: Super Reuben
description: A super pig arrives to save you when you're in trouble.
body:
Have you ever been neck deep in skeletons with nobody to save your bacon?
Fear not! Super Reuben will come to your rescue.

![Check him out.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nFiC8G1Z/images/6d9576c8a40aa1a63e023dcd79526173d534943a.png)
